creators.hero_subtitle: Experience hidden waterfalls, ancient tribal heritage, and authentic street food straight from the lens of the creators who call this land home.

home.gateways_desc: Filter deep through specialized regional layers curated to uncover raw tribal art, sacred waterfalls, and historical routes.
home.telemetry_desc: Enable your location sensor to calculate distance parameters to surrounding waterfalls, sanctuaries, and guides in real-time. All coordinates are handled locally for offline resilience.
home.telemetry_deactivated_desc: Enable location to calculate distances to Sirpur, Chitrakote, or Kutumsar caves.
home.seasonal_desc: Chhattisgarh changes character dramatically with the sun and rain. Tap below to navigate based on seasonal road access and weather safety parameters.
home.responsible_desc: As a community-powered space, we respect local customs, protect deep Sal sanctuaries, and strictly enforce visual carrying limits.
home.responsible_accord_1_desc: Our forest trails operate under strict ecological load regulations. When visiting reserves like Kanger Valley, limit plastics, pack out waste, and abide by group sizes set by forestry rangers.
home.responsible_accord_2_desc: Chhattisgarh’s tribal clans hold distinct spiritual protocols. Always seek permission before photographing local residents or sacred clan monoliths. Avoid flashy attire during local bazaar hours.
home.responsible_accord_3_title: Sound & Light Discipline in Wildlife Zones
home.responsible_accord_3_desc: Limestone caverns and reserve boundaries require pin-drop silence. Loud sound speakers, heavy flashlights, or littering inside sensitive ecosystems is heavily fined by tribal local bodies.
home.voice_instructions: Try saying: 'मुझे चित्रकोट झरना दिखाओ' or 'मोर नजदीक पर्यटन जगह बताव'
home.voice_error: Speech recognition error. Please try again.
home.voice_not_supported: Speech recognition not supported in this browser.
home.slide0_subtitle: Experience the majestic power of Indravati River's flow.
home.slide1_subtitle: Pristine woodlands home to unique wildlife & ancient folklore.
home.slide2_subtitle: 1400 years of brickwork chronicles and archaeological gold.
home.monsoon_desc: Chitrakote and Tirathgarh roar with unmatched volume. The forest is absolute vibrant green.
home.winter_desc: Perfect cool climate to discover archaeological relics at Sirpur and spot dynamic bison herds in reserve corridors.
home.summer_desc: Escape the heat inside deep subterranean Kutumsar limestone caves, maintaining standard cool temperatures year-round.

detail.story_note_desc: This folklore has been transcribed directly from oral chronicles shared by regional tribal community gatherers. Respect native narratives.

sos.title: Emergency SOS & Disaster System
sos.subtitle: High-contrast emergency dashboard. Designed to operate completely offline in remote forest tracks and low-bandwidth mountain corridors.
sos.dispatch_desc: Toggling the SOS switch instantly triggers an offline local alert containing your last cached coordinates, routing telemetry, and emergency profile data to nearby district forest guards.
sos.broadcasting_desc: Broadcasting local coordinates to Bastar Forest Command Desk. Estimated response team travel: 12 mins.
sos.women_safety_desc: Before setting out on remote, low-signal paths, configure your trusted safety corridor. This automatically caches your target route points, estimating your arrival schedules. It enables emergency sharing with verified state authorities.
sos.linked_guardian: Linked Guardian: State Safety Desk Hotline (112)
sos.sync_success: Success: Secure route cached. An automated SMS alert containing offline tracking telemetry parameters will be dispatched if check-in time exceeds 60 minutes.
